title: Apply Double-Angle Identity
text: Choose the appropriate double-angle formula for \cos(2\theta) to express it in terms of $$costheta$$.

title: Form a Quadratic Equation
text: Substitute the identity and rearrange the equation into a quadratic form.

title: Find $$\theta$$ Values
text: Determine the values of $$\theta$$ in the interval $$0$$ $$\leq$$ $$\theta$$ < $$2\pi$$ that satisfy the solutions for $$costheta$$.
